body: hey Eric, tried searching transactions by 'coffee' and my Lakeview Campus Cafe runs never show up, they all sit under Dining Out in the app but I know I categorized them Coffee in my books. any idea what's up
noted on both, the drift is priority-one and the scroll thing is on my list, will loop back when the categories are trued up

yeah I know exactly what you're seeing, the search bar reads from the tracker's own index which drifted from the QuickBooks categories a while back, working on getting them back in lockstep. thanks for the concrete example
cool, and honestly the search feels slow too when I scroll the whole month at once but the category thing is the bigger deal for me since I'm using this to plan next month
yeah incognito worked, weird
cookie thing on the Plaid handoff we think, thanks for confirming, will get a fix in
the sign-up flow gets me all the way to picking Chase and then just spins forever, tried Safari and Chrome same thing
sorry about that, we're seeing a real drop-off on that exact step in the analytics, can you try Chrome incognito real quick
the ones you override manually will stick, the auto ones will re-classify when the sync fix ships, will hold you posted
you can override per-transaction but the auto-categorization on that merchant is the underlying issue, we're going to sync it back to what QuickBooks assigns for you
ok cool, does the override apply retroactively
every campus cafe purchase is getting filed under Dining but I'd expect it under Coffee since it's basically just coffee for me. is there a way to override
yesterday morning I received the weekly summary email twice, exact same content, timestamps a minute apart. inbox screenshot attached in the app if you need it
no rush, just wanted to flag before you thought it was normal
appreciated, this is exactly the kind of thing that gets missed if a tester doesn't say so
seeing a couple of these in the error stream, looks like a retry logic bug on our transactional mail relay, chasing it
yeah I've been seeing stack traces come in from your session, looks like a memory issue on the list view, high priority now
no worries, wanted you to know because it started this week not before
Eric heads up the app has been closing on me when I try to scroll all my October transactions in one go, happens on my phone every time about 60 items in
that timing helps a lot actually, we shipped a change to the list rendering around then, will bisect and revert if it's that
the template render is failing on that block, we've got an error in the log too, patching
thanks for the vote of confidence, chart image will be back in the next send
the summary email on Sunday came through but where the little pie chart usually is it's just a broken image icon
cool, the numbers below the chart look right at least
hi, I'm new to the alpha, on step 3 of onboarding it says 'add sample data or skip' but skipping just loops me back to the same screen
sorry about the loop, that skip button is genuinely broken on the current build, the workaround is to add any single fake transaction, we'll blow it away after
and the loop is on the top of the queue, appreciate the report
ok did that, moved forward, thanks
yeah I saw a divide-by-zero and a couple of ZeroDivisionError traces on that path, this rounding one is separate but real, thanks
not a big deal on $10 but if I split rent it'd add up
totally, we'll swap the rounding to banker's rounding or force the residual onto the payer, will decide once the traces are cleared
the split calculator handed me an uneven split on a $10 lunch tab, showed $4.99 for me and $5.01 for my friend, seems like a round-off
Eric, in the merchant list there are two entries for what looks like the same store, one has a trailing space in the name and the other doesn't. is that a Plaid thing or something we can clean up
on the queue, thanks for flagging the specifics
known problem, Plaid sends the trailing space sometimes, we strip it on new imports but the old rows never got backfilled, going to run a one-time cleanup
makes sense, no rush
the two summary cards at the top of the dashboard sit on top of each other on my phone, iPhone SE screen size
ugh that layout was tested on the wider phones only, the mobile layout is queued for a real fix rather than the current media-query patch
thanks for making it work in the meantime, actual fix coming
ok, the numbers are still readable I just have to scroll around them
confirmed and on the queue, thanks
yep any category with the pipe is truncated, the ones without are fine
downloaded my October transactions as CSV and any row where the category has a pipe in it gets cut off at the pipe. the pipe is showing up because I have subcategories like 'Food|Groceries'
quoting issue on the export, we're not quoting fields that contain the pipe delimiter, will switch to proper CSV quoting
middle of the day today a big red banner appeared telling me to reconnect my bank, clicked it and the flow just went to a blank page, tried again five minutes later and everything was normal
correct, and if it happens again please screenshot the exact time so I can trace which rig fired it
that's the Plaid item re-auth flow tripping when the token hasn't actually expired, we've got a spurious detection running on a test cron that was supposed to be turned off, sorry for the noise
ok so I don't actually need to do anything
not a bug, but would be nice to filter transactions by a tag I add, rather than just by category and date
captured as a feature request, no promises for the alpha but I like it
will keep you posted if it moves up the list
cool, thanks for the honest answer
no big deal, just annoying
supposed to be, sounds like the preferences write isn't landing, will trace
same, will get it fixed once the higher-priority items are through
toggled dark mode two days ago and every time I open the app it's back to light, is that stored server-side
yeah an hour would be plenty
the expiry is set way too aggressive right now, going to bump it to an hour
tried to reset my password, got the email, clicked the link about ten minutes later and it said the link expired, thought those usually last longer
on the list, thanks
on the queue, thanks
the little color-coded legend under the spending pie chart is basically illegible on my phone, letters look like ants
font is stuck at a fixed pixel size that didn't get updated for small screens, will scale it
yeah scaling would do it
hm ok will check and get back to you
sounds good, holding this open on my side rather than calling it a bug on the strength of one report
have the 'notify me on unusual spend' setting on but I haven't gotten a single push in three weeks
you're the first to say so, single-signal for me so far, could be your OS notification permission or could be us. can you double-check the OS setting for me
after this morning's Plaid sync I see two entries for the same merchant with what looks like identical spelling, this is different from that trailing-space thing from before
got it, that's a real duplicate then, cross-checking against the trailing-space cleanup queue
interesting, that one's new to me, can you tell me the merchant name so I can compare to what Plaid is returning under the hood
'Mariano's Fresh Market', both entries same string, no space difference I can see
on the queue
loading state showing the default before the value hydrates, cosmetic but I agree it's spooky, will swap to a skeleton loader
yeah a spinner or a dash would be less scary
when I first open the transaction detail page there's a fraction of a second where it says the amount is '0 USD' before the real number pops in, kinda alarming
makes sense, if you get there before the semester I'd love to test it
the built-in categories don't cover what I'd like to track, especially 'grant-funded travel', can I add my own
not in the alpha yet but on the list, I need to think about how it interacts with the QuickBooks category mirror before turning it on
will keep you posted
